acceptance.assertion: Session profile contract includes read_roots, write_roots, allowed_grips, forbidden_hosts and max_risk_level.
At least one high-risk action is blocked by runtime enforcement, not just documentation.
High-impact paths require explicit target, reason, expiry and recovery or irreversibility metadata.
Focused tests cover allowed read-only action, blocked write outside scope, blocked forbidden host and explicit escalation shape.

goal: Implement the first enforceable session capability profile layer with explicit read roots, write roots, allowed grips, forbidden hosts and max risk level.

metadata.non_goal: Does not remove existing break-glass paths until observe/maintain paths are tested.

validated_acceptance.explicit-escalation: High-risk grips require session_escalation with target, reason, expires_at_unix and recovery or irreversibility metadata. session_escalation is stripped before dispatch to the underlying grip runner.
validated_acceptance.profile-contract: Runtime exposes session_profile contract with read_roots, write_roots, allowed_grips, forbidden_hosts and max_risk_level. Live grip_list shows trusted-owner profile with read_roots=[/], write_roots=[/], allowed_grips=[*], forbidden_hosts=[], max_risk_level=high.
validated_acceptance.runtime-enforced: grip_run enforces allowed_grips, risk level and high-risk escalation before dispatch. Operator argv validation calls the forbidden-host guard directly with the resolved policy.
validated_acceptance.tests: Focused and full validation passed: make validate ran 717 tests OK locally and during scheduled runtime deploy; GitHub validate (3.10) and validate (3.12) passed; final review gate PASS.

validation.grabowski_pr: heimgewebe/grabowski#119 merged via squash at fbc4aebcb8d4b1575f3f4354f0b11f74fd1e25b1 with head e6327db5902b9711518b19fc83a5aead67c9e6a9.
non_claims: Does not mutate the live access policy file.
Does not grant automatic high-impact authority.
Does not remove existing break-glass or trusted-owner paths.
Does not prove host reachability or grip execution success merely from profile visibility.
validation.review_gate: tools/pr_review_gate.py PASS for PR #119 with self-review and external agy evidence; diff_sha256=9f3d256c628e46472b77599e030c1484b03c970a116ffbe5395eac9b8249462a.
validation.runtime_deploy: Scheduled deploy job grabowski-job-06fb8a97e9c6 completed; deploy log reports PASS and repo_head fbc4aebcb8d4b1575f3f4354f0b11f74fd1e25b1. grabowski_status confirms provenance_valid, runtime_binding_valid and environment_compatibility_valid.

metadata.verification_note: Implemented and deployed enforceable session capability profile gates. The live trusted-owner policy remains pre-T006 but is deployment-compatible through projected defaults; no live policy mutation was performed.

title: Add enforceable session capability profiles
